purpose: Provide a source-backed market baseline for the live SparkStream capability matrix. This config is intentionally descriptive: current local reports decide SparkStream status, while this file records what the broader market appears to offer.

refresh_policy.notes: Do not turn market comparison into a benchmark target by itself. Use it to spot product gaps, governance gaps, and differentiated research opportunities.

market_systems.name: OpenAI Codex
capability_notes: Coding agent that can read, edit, and run code.
Codex cloud can work on tasks in the background, including in parallel, in its own cloud environment.
Can connect to GitHub repositories and create pull requests.

market_systems.name: Anthropic Claude Code
capability_notes: Agentic coding tool that reads a codebase, edits files, runs commands, and integrates with developer tools.
Available across terminal, IDE, desktop app, and browser surfaces.
Understands codebases and can work across multiple files and tools.

market_systems.name: Google Gemini CLI
capability_notes: Open-source AI agent that brings Gemini into the terminal.
Includes Google Search grounding, file operations, shell commands, and web fetching.
Supports MCP integrations, custom context files, conversation checkpointing, and a large context window.

market_systems.name: GitHub Copilot Cloud Agent
capability_notes: Can work independently in the background on repository tasks.
Can research a repository, create implementation plans, fix bugs, implement incremental features, improve tests, update docs, address technical debt, and resolve merge conflicts.
Runs in an ephemeral GitHub Actions-powered development environment with access to tests and linters.

market_systems.name: Cursor
capability_notes: Agent surfaces span desktop, CLI, browser/mobile, GitHub, Slack, Linear, JetBrains, and more.
Uses codebase understanding, parallel subagents, codebase indexing, planning, debugging, terminal commands, checkpoints, plugins, skills, and MCP.
Product page describes long-running autonomous coding research and cloud agents.

market_systems.name: Devin
capability_notes: Autonomous AI software engineer that can write, run, and test code.
Targets Linear/Jira tickets, features, bug reproduction and fixes, internal tools, refactors, migrations, PR review, tests, and documentation.
Advanced capabilities include managed sessions in parallel, session outcome analysis, playbooks, knowledge management, and schedules.

capability_domains.name: RMI architecture governance
capability_domains.target: Keep the ratcheting modular architecture explicit, measured, and auditable.
capability_domains.market_standard: Commercial agents expose strong task execution surfaces, but usually do not expose an RMI-style benchmark/residual/tool/arm growth ledger to users.

capability_domains.name: Octopus router and governed specialist arms
capability_domains.target: Route tasks through bounded arms with schemas, permission envelopes, local memory, reliability metrics, and lifecycle state.
capability_domains.market_standard: Market systems increasingly support parallel or specialized agents, but arm cards with local benchmarks, residuals, permissions, and split/merge/deprecate governance are a differentiated research design.

capability_domains.name: Arm-sucker transfer hierarchy
capability_domains.target: Keep high-transfer capability in reusable arms while attaching low-transfer benchmark, game, simulator, and asset specializations as loadable suckers.
capability_domains.market_standard: Most agent products expose tools or subagents, but do not expose a governed hierarchy where reusable core skills explicitly feed low-transfer specializations with transfer artifacts.

capability_domains.name: Benchmark ratchet, regression floor, and residual escrow
capability_domains.target: Continuously promote mastered benchmarks to regression while preserving residual tails and moving the frontier.
capability_domains.market_standard: Market coding agents report task/PR results and may have internal evals, but persistent user-visible benchmark lifecycle and residual escrow are not common product surfaces.

capability_domains.name: Public calibration and market comparison
capability_domains.target: Separate internal frontier pressure from public apples-to-apples comparison and market capability posture.
capability_domains.market_standard: Mature products publish capability claims and product surfaces; SparkStream should keep a reproducible local matrix plus source URLs instead of relying on memory.

capability_domains.name: Loop closure and tool registry
capability_domains.target: Turn repeated successful workflows into verified, parameterized tools with lifecycle cost gates.
capability_domains.market_standard: Market agents support tools, commands, skills, MCP, and playbooks; SparkStream's differentiator is explicit trajectory-to-tool ratcheting with residual governance.

capability_domains.name: Autonomous daemon with sparse teacher escalation
capability_domains.target: Run local improvement cycles for long periods while calling the teacher only when local evidence justifies it.
capability_domains.market_standard: Commercial products support background tasks, schedules, and cloud agents; SparkStream is narrower operationally today but broader in explicit self-improvement governance.

capability_domains.name: Live dashboard and observability
capability_domains.target: Show live training, benchmark, data, RL, source, checkpoint, teacher, context, and capability status.
capability_domains.market_standard: Market products offer agent dashboards and logs; SparkStream should expose research-specific graphs and ledgers locally.

capability_domains.name: Distributed Hive app runtime
capability_domains.target: Install Project Theseus on trusted Windows/macOS/Linux machines through a no-terminal wizard or server-friendly CLI, join phones by QR, switch between Hive profiles, discover peers, advertise CUDA/MLX/CPU capacity, and route bounded real CUDA/MLX training/eval chunks plus safe inference tasks across the hive.
capability_domains.market_standard: Market agents often run hosted workers or background cloud agents; Project Theseus needs a private local-network mesh that uses owned machines for training and inference while keeping teacher use sparse.

capability_domains.name: Major/minor checkpoint versioning and checkpoint chat
capability_domains.target: Save major snapshots plus minor delta chains and let the user inspect or chat with live/checkpoint state.
capability_domains.market_standard: Market products provide conversation checkpoints, code checkpoints, or session histories; SparkStream's minor-chain artifact model is locally specialized and still research-grade.

capability_domains.name: Resource-aware Rust/CUDA training path
capability_domains.target: Use RTX 2060 Super efficiently, prefer Rust/CUDA hot loops, and keep Python as orchestration/reporting.
capability_domains.market_standard: Commercial coding agents optimize their hosted or provider runtime; SparkStream must optimize the user's local GPU and Rust/CUDA stack explicitly.

capability_domains.name: BabyLM/grammar learning track
capability_domains.target: Maintain public/local BabyLM comparator plus mutated private frontier/regression pressure.
capability_domains.market_standard: Market agents are general language/coding systems; SparkStream's current measured learning domain is small local grammar/sequence learning.

capability_domains.name: RL environment learning and benchmark ingestion
capability_domains.target: Use local and staged RL environments as benchmark/regression/frontier surfaces.
capability_domains.market_standard: Coding agents may operate in sandboxes, but they generally are not exposed as self-training RL systems over local emulated or Gym-style environments.

capability_domains.name: Drone racing control and AI Grand Prix readiness
capability_domains.target: Learn simulation-first drone hover, waypoint, visual racing, MAVLink/MAVSDK control, and competition compliance without unsafe live-hardware side effects.
capability_domains.market_standard: General agent products can help code drone stacks, but Project Theseus needs local RL/simulator/control adapters and safety gates because it is meant to learn the skill itself.

capability_domains.name: Minecraft and open-world RL
capability_domains.target: Learn local licensed Minecraft and Minecraft-like open-world survival, crafting, navigation, player instruction following, and long-horizon skill reuse.
capability_domains.market_standard: General agent products can help write Minecraft automation code, but Theseus needs local RL harnesses, trace capsules, transfer artifacts, and account/server safety gates because it is meant to learn the skill itself.

capability_domains.name: Native voice I/O
capability_domains.target: Learn speech input/output as a native Theseus head/router capability without provider, installed-package, or pretrained third-party STT/TTS inference.
capability_domains.market_standard: Market assistants often provide voice through hosted or separately pretrained speech stacks. Project Theseus treats speech as a native local learning frontier and keeps third-party speech inference out of non-teacher paths.

capability_domains.name: Training data inventory and source governance
capability_domains.target: Track data roles, licenses, staging state, provenance, and blocked/allowed training-use policies.
capability_domains.market_standard: Market systems handle repo/project context; SparkStream needs local training data governance because it is explicitly self-training.

capability_domains.name: Synthetic data curation
capability_domains.target: Create higher-signal residual-targeted data locally with leakage, quality, blend, and provenance gates.
capability_domains.market_standard: Frontier labs use synthetic data internally; products rarely expose user-governed synthetic training-data pipelines.

capability_domains.name: Packetized context scoring and compaction
capability_domains.target: Score, compact, summarize, merge, and evict packets so long-horizon autonomy keeps high-value context.
capability_domains.market_standard: Market agents support long context, memory, or checkpoints; SparkStream exposes a local scored packet ledger for long-run self-improvement.

capability_domains.name: Safety, permission envelopes, and reflex/failsafe layer
capability_domains.target: Bound arms by risk tier, runtime tier, memory/tool permissions, approval gates, and reflex/failsafe behavior.
capability_domains.market_standard: Commercial agents rely on permissions, sandboxing, approval flows, and admin controls; SparkStream mirrors this locally for self-training and modular arms.

capability_domains.name: ATTD repository health governance
capability_domains.target: Use deterministic assembly-theoretic technical-debt triggers to pause autonomous growth and emit bounded maintenance packets before structural debt compounds.
capability_domains.market_standard: Market coding agents rely on tests, linters, reviews, and product guardrails; SparkStream adds an explicit repository-native ATTD gate over self-evolution.

capability_domains.name: General codebase engineering agent
capability_domains.target: Independently inspect, edit, test, and improve arbitrary repositories with PR-grade output.
capability_domains.market_standard: This is a mature market category with strong products that edit files, run commands/tests, work in background/cloud/IDE surfaces, and open PRs.

capability_domains.name: External research, benchmark, and data discovery
capability_domains.target: Find new benchmarks/data, preserve provenance, audit licenses/terms, and stage approved sources without unsafe bulk ingestion.
capability_domains.market_standard: Market agents can browse/fetch/search with tools; SparkStream keeps network fetch off by default and routes discoveries through audit and import policy.
